top_signals.title: Nathan Allman, founder and CEO of Ondo Finance, dies unexpectedly
top_signals.summary: Ian De Bode, president of Ondo Finance, will assume the role of CEO, the company said in a statement on Monday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
